meanings.definition: seize and take control without authority and possibly with force; take as one's right or possession
examples: He assumed to himself the right to fill all positions in the town
She seized control of the throne after her husband died

meanings.definition: take on titles, offices, duties, responsibilities
examples: When will the new President assume office?

meanings.definition: free someone temporarily from his or her obligations
take on as one's own the expenses or debts of another person
examples: She agreed to bear the responsibility

meanings.definition: take over ownership of; of corporations and companies

examples: They would like to take it over again

meanings.definition: take up and practice as one's own
take up, as of debts or payments
